note: Add only processes `name` and `position` today; other properties are set-only on an existing sheet. Those are marked enforcement=report until Add gains parity or the schema locks set-only explicitly.

name.description: sheet tab name. Returned path is /<name>; readback goes through DocumentNode.Path / .Preview rather than Format[].

autoFilter.description: range to apply AutoFilter on (e.g. A1:D10). `true` enables on used range. Note: currently Set-only on existing sheets, not consumed by Add.
autoFilter.readback: range string as stored, or boolean true

tabColor.description: sheet tab color. Set-only on existing sheets.

hidden.description: hide the sheet. Set-only on existing sheets.

freeze.description: freeze panes anchor (cell ref). A2 freezes row 1; B1 freezes column A; B2 freezes row 1 + column A. `none` / `false` / empty removes the freeze. Set-only on existing sheets.
freeze.readback: top-left cell ref of frozen pane (e.g. A2); absent when no freeze
